channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kenya urged to rebuild cricket through unity, governance reform and development structures
item.description: The editorial discusses the urgent need to rebuild Kenyan cricket, highlighting both governance challenges and the sport’s declining performance over the years. The newly elected Cricket Kenya board, ...

item.title: Convergence of Shavuot, Pentecost and Eid al-Adha highlights shared values across faiths
item.description: This week, followers of the three major monotheistic religions are observing key holidays in close succession, presenting a powerful moment for reflection on unity. Jewish communities celebrated Shavu...

item.title: Xiu Xiu to release ‘Eraserhead Xiu Xiu’, a new album inspired by David Lynch’s 1977 film
item.description: Experimental band Xiu Xiu have announced a new album titled ‘Eraserhead Xiu Xiu’, inspired by David Lynch’s cult 1977 debut film ‘Eraserhead’. The seven-track project was recorded in Berlin and is sch...

item.title: BJP secures decisive victory in Falta re-poll with over one lakh vote margin; TMC suffers major setback
item.description: In a significant political development in West Bengal, the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) secured a sweeping victory in the Falta assembly re-poll, with its candidate Debangshu Panda winning by a record...

item.title: Mamelodi Sundowns secure second CAF Champions League title after draw in Rabat
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns have been crowned CAF Champions League winners for a second time after holding AS FAR to a 1-1 draw in the second leg of the final in Rabat, securing a 2-1 aggregate victory followin...

item.title: Master Hanz Cua releases feng shui guidance for May 25, 2026
item.description: The article from ABS-CBN Lifestyle features feng shui expert Master Hanz Cua sharing his daily feng shui predictions for May 25, 2026. Published on May 25, 2026 at 7:00 AM PHT, the piece is part of a ...

item.title: ABS-CBN features 'padayon' as Word of the Day for May 25, 2026
item.description: ABS-CBN Lifestyle presents its Word of the Day feature for May 25, 2026, highlighting the Filipino term “padayon.” The entry is part of the platform’s continuing effort to promote language appreciatio...

item.title: Tanzanian teacher becomes first female big winner on SportPesa Aviator with Sh400 million payout
item.description: A Tanzanian schoolteacher, Grace George Litimba, has made history after winning Sh400 million on the SportPesa Aviator game, becoming the first female big winner on the platform in the country. Her un...

item.title: President confirm UK and European headline tour for November 2026
item.description: Masked metal band President have announced a full UK and European headline tour scheduled for November 2026, following the release of their upcoming debut album 'Blood Of Your Empire', set to arrive o...

item.title: Novak Djokovic rallies past Giovanni Mpetshi Perricard in four sets at Roland Garros
item.description: Novak Djokovic advanced to the second round of the French Open after overcoming a difficult start and a strongly pro-French crowd to defeat 22-year-old Giovanni Mpetshi Perricard in four sets, 5-7, 7-...

item.title: Barbra Streisand sends video message after missing Cannes appearance due to knee injury
item.description: Barbra Streisand has addressed the Cannes Film Festival through a recorded video message after being unable to attend in person due to a knee injury. The 84-year-old performer and filmmaker had been d...

item.title: Republican Lawmakers and Foreign Policy Hawks React to Reported U.S.–Iran Peace Negotiations Under Trump
item.description: President Donald Trump is reportedly considering a peace agreement aimed at ending the ongoing war with Iran, though key details of the proposed deal remain uncertain. According to reporting reference...

item.title: ADC faction adopts Dumebi Kachikwu as its presidential candidate for 2027 amid internal party divisions
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) is currently facing internal division as a faction of the party has formally adopted its 2023 presidential candidate, Dumebi Kachikwu, as its sole flag bearer for...

item.title: Arsenal keep title hopes alive with win over Crystal Palace as West Ham struggle near relegation zone
item.description: Arsenal have continued their strong push in the Premier League title race after a hard-fought 2-1 victory against Crystal Palace on Sunday, May 24, 2026. The win keeps their championship ambitions ali...

item.title: Delhi Gymkhana Club closure debate raises concerns over heritage institutions and India's global image
item.description: The opinion piece discusses the ongoing controversy surrounding the Delhi Gymkhana Club and the implications of its potential closure. The author, a retired IPS officer, argues that the club has becom...

item.title: Winnipeg police to ride public transit alongside passengers to improve safety
item.description: Winnipeg police are taking steps to increase visibility and improve safety on the city’s public transit system by joining passengers during their daily commutes. The initiative involves officers ridin...

item.title: Abia Governor Alex Otti to privately fund ecumenical centre in Umuahia
item.description: Abia State Governor, Alex Otti, don talk say he go personally fund the construction of a new ecumenical centre in Umuahia, without using any money from the state government. The governor made this kno...

item.title: Call to curb hate speech and political violence ahead of the upcoming elections
item.description: The editorial raises concern over growing political tension in Kenya as the country moves closer to the next General Election, expected in August next year. It warns that early signs of unrest are alr...

item.title: Piastri misses points finish in Canadian Grand Prix as Antonelli wins fourth straight race
item.description: Oscar Piastri endured a disappointing outing at the Canadian round of the 2026 motorsport season, finishing outside the points positions. Despite expectations heading into the race, Piastri was unable...

item.title: Human rights groups raise concerns over immigration enforcement during 2026 FIFA World Cup in the U.S.
item.description: Human rights advocates are expressing concern over the potential impact of immigration enforcement policies during the upcoming 2026 FIFA World Cup, which will be hosted across 11 cities in the United...
